monday_sweep_status: UNCONFIRMED — no new entries in new_replies.json. Either not executed or zero replies found.

imap_mandatory_today.execute: Per Batch 5 lead — before each Day-7 send. In send order (09:00-10:30 window).
imap_mandatory_today.priority: First action per lead — before each individual send. Not bulk.

outcomes_and_actions.if_interested: Write immediately to data/new_replies.json. Classify here as INTERESTED with full reasoning. Cancel Day-7 send for that lead — use interested variant from daily_email_plan.json (conditional_handling section). Reply in thread to their message. Prepare bespoke proposal within 24h from reply time (NON-NEGOTIABLE). Log CHANGELOG. Add entry to value_delivery_queue.json batch_5_interested_leads.
outcomes_and_actions.if_not_interested: Classify here as NOT_INTERESTED. Cancel Day-7 permanently. Suppress email channel. Block LinkedIn. Log CHANGELOG. Update lead status to 'lost'.
outcomes_and_actions.if_unsubscribe: Classify here as UNSUBSCRIBE. Suppress ALL channels within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG. Cancel Day-7 and Day-14.
outcomes_and_actions.if_ooo: Classify here as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Pause Day-7. Send Day-7 on day after stated return if within 14-day window (return must be before 2026-05-25). 4-touchpoint limit applies.
outcomes_and_actions.if_wrong_person: Classify here as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence. Investigate correct contact. Log CHANGELOG.
outcomes_and_actions.if_clean: Proceed with Day-7 send. Log CHANGELOG.

post_day7_monitoring.imap_check_frequency: Per lead as replies arrive. Daily check Wednesday-Friday minimum.
post_day7_monitoring.classification_protocol: Write any new reply to new_replies.json immediately. Classify here. Update value_delivery_queue.json if INTERESTED. Log CHANGELOG same session.
post_day7_monitoring.note: Day-7 post-send window is historically the strongest reply window for undecided leads — they have had 7 days to consider the Day-0 pain point, and the new angle in Day-7 creates fresh urgency.

if_interested.action: Write reply to new_replies.json immediately. Classify here as INTERESTED with full reasoning. Cancel Day-7 send for that lead (or if already sent: do not send Day-14 without re-checking). Use interested variant from daily_email_plan.json (conditional_handling section) — reply in thread. Proposal within 24h (from reply time — 24/7, non-negotiable). Update value_delivery_queue.json batch_5_interested_leads. Log CHANGELOG.
if_interested.24h_sla: NON-NEGOTIABLE. Tom (Ripon Road Carpentry) asked for pricing and never received it. That does not repeat.
if_interested.proposal_options: See value_delivery_queue.json (value_delivery_on_interested section) — 3 options by signal type.

if_not_interested.action: Classify as NOT_INTERESTED. Suppress email channel permanently. Block LinkedIn permanently. Log CHANGELOG. Update lead status to 'lost'.

if_ooo.action: Classify as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Pause sequence. LinkedIn still valid (passive). Send Day-7 (or Day-14 if Day-7 already sent) on day after stated return within 4-touchpoint limit.

if_wrong_person.action: Classify as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence. Investigate correct contact via website/Companies House. Log CHANGELOG.

if_unsubscribe.action: Classify as UNSUBSCRIBE. Suppress ALL channels permanently within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG. Cancel all pending sends.

summary.hands_instructions: 1. TODAY: IMAP per Batch 5 lead before each Day-7 send (per lead, in send order). Write any new reply to new_replies.json immediately. 2. If INTERESTED: classify here, cancel Day-7 (use interested variant from daily_email_plan.json conditional_handling section), 24h proposal SLA from reply time. 3. If NOT_INTERESTED: classify, cancel Day-7, suppress all channels. 4. If UNSUBSCRIBE: classify, suppress within 24h (GDPR Article 21), cancel Day-7 and Day-14. 5. Do NOT sweep leads 1/3/22 under any circumstances. 6. CHANGELOG mandatory today — 51 days overdue.
